description.value: Code system to classify alias by type.

definition.value: An alias that represents the official name of the entity. Used where this is different from the preferred name stored against the name element for operational purposes.
An alias that represents the preferred (usual) l name of the entity. Used where this is different from the official name stored against the name element.
An alias that represents a recognised abbreviated name in common use for the entity.
An alias that represents the usual recognised acronym for the entity.
An alias that represents a short recognised acronym for the entity. Such abbreviations are generally shorter than the standard acronym and typically used for readability in charts and tables.
